allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\(''lucide-react''\); const social = [''Linkedin'',''Github'',''Facebook'',''Instagram'',''Twitter'',''Globe'',''Mail'',''Phone'',''MapPin'',''Send'',''ExternalLink'',''Link2'']; social.forEach\(n => console.log\(n, '':'', typeof icons[n] === ''undefined'' ? ''MISSING'' : ''OK''\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const icons = Object.keys\(require\(''lucide-react''\)\); const matches = icons.filter\(n => /linke|github|face|insta|twit/i.test\(n\)\); console.log\(matches.join\(''\\n''\)\);")
Bash(timeout 90 bash -c 'while [ ! -d ""node_modules/@icons-pack/react-simple-icons"" ]; do sleep 2; done; echo ""INSTALLED""')

Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@icons-pack/react-simple-icons''\); const names = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => /linkedin|github|facebook|instagram|^Si[XxTt]/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,20\); console.log\(names.join\(''\\n''\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@icons-pack/react-simple-icons''\); console.log\(''SiLinkedin:'', typeof m.SiLinkedin\); console.log\(''SiX:'', typeof m.SiX\);")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@icons-pack/react-simple-icons''\); const names = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => /linked/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names.join\(''\\n''\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@icons-pack/react-simple-icons''\); const names = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => /^SiX/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,10\); console.log\(names.join\(''\\n''\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@icons-pack/react-simple-icons''\); const names = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => /linke/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names.join\(''\\n''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@icons-pack/react-simple-icons''\); console.log\(''total exports:'', Object.keys\(m\).length\); const names = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => !k.endsWith\(''Hex''\)\).filter\(k => /^Si[A-Z]/\).slice\(0,5\); console.log\(''sample:'', names\);")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@icons-pack/react-simple-icons''\); const names = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => k === ''SiFacebook'' || k === ''SiGithub'' || k === ''SiInstagram'' || k === ''SiX''\); names.forEach\(n => console.log\(n, typeof m[n]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@icons-pack/react-simple-icons''\); const k = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(n => n.startsWith\(''Si''\) && n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''in''\)\).slice\(0,20\); console.log\(k.join\(''\\n''\)\);")
